Businesses.profileDescription: Private chef services for fine dining at home, intimate events, and premium business dinners in Utrecht and nearby cities.
Luxury pastry experiences, dessert tables, and boutique baking workshops for private parties and branded events in Amsterdam.
Live fire dining, premium BBQ catering, and private chef grill experiences for events, terraces, and business gatherings.
Same-day courier service for local food, premium meal boxes, and hospitality deliveries across Utrecht and the Randstad.
Temperature-aware city courier for pastry, chilled boxes, and scheduled same-day delivery for specialty food businesses.

Offers.title: Private Dining at Home
Offers.description: A five-course in-home dining experience prepared by a private chef.

Offers.title: French Pastry Workshop
Offers.description: A small-group workshop focused on classic French pastry techniques.

Offers.title: Macaron Masterclass
Offers.description: A hands-on pastry workshop covering shells, fillings, and professional finishing techniques.

Offers.title: Live Fire Catering Experience
Offers.description: A chef-led live fire catering service with premium meats, sides, and on-site preparation.

Offers.title: Weekend Dessert Box Pickup
Offers.description: A premium pastry takeaway box with seasonal desserts for local pickup at the Amsterdam location.

Offers.title: Same Day City Delivery
Offers.description: A same-day courier service for food and hospitality orders within the city region.

Offers.title: Chilled Express Delivery
Offers.description: A temperature-aware courier option for pastry boxes, chilled desserts, and fragile food deliveries.
